## Parent
Reference: PORTFOLIO_V2_PRD.md

## What to build
Implement a Skills section with a grid of icons and labels to showcase technical capabilities relevant to data science and quantitative roles.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `Skills` component in `src/components/Skills.tsx`
- [ ] Skills data defined in `src/data/skills.ts`
  - Categories: Languages, Libraries/Frameworks, Tools
  - Examples: Python, Pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, Tableau, React, etc.
- [ ] Grid layout with icons and labels
- [ ] Icons from react-icons or similar library
- [ ] Hover effects on skill items
- [ ] Section title: "Technical Skills" or similar
- [ ] Integration into main Layout from Issue #006
- [ ] Responsive grid (columns adjust based on screen size)
- [ ] Consistent styling with theme

## Blocked by
Issue #006 (Hero & Basic Layout)
